# Faktum AI

> Suomenkielinen tekoälyuutis- ja analyysisivusto IT-ammattilaisille, AI-rakentajille ja päätöksentekijöille.

## Site

- URL: https://www.faktum-ai.com
- Language: Finnish (fi-FI)
- RSS: https://www.faktum-ai.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://www.faktum-ai.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Topics index: https://www.faktum-ai.com/aiheet/

## Content types

- /uutiset/ — AI news and regulatory updates (Finnish context)
- /analyysit/ — In-depth analysis (markets, infrastructure, business models)
- /haastattelut/ — Interview summaries
- /tyokalut/ — Tool reviews for builders

## Editorial line

Journalistic, technical, source-backed. Not hype. Claims and uncertainty are separated. Raw third-party material is rewritten as Faktum AI analysis.

## Contact

- marko@faktum-ai.com
- About: https://www.faktum-ai.com/tietoa/
